item.title: MIUI OS2.0.210.0.VNGMIXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 13 Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 13 Global

Codename: sapphire

Version: OS2.0.210.0.VNGMIXM | 15.0

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to March 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
